# sakura_addon_waf (Data Source)

Get information about an existing Addon WAF.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sakura_addon_waf" "foobar" {
  id = "addon-resource-id" // sakura- prefix
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the Addon WAF

### Read-Only

- `deployment_name` (String) The deployment name of the Addon WAF
- `location` (String) The location of the Addon WAF
- `origin` (Attributes) The origin settings of the Addon WAF. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--origin))
- `patterns` (List of String) The route patterns of the Addon WAF.
- `pricing_level` (Number) The pricing level of the Addon WAF.
- `url` (String) The URL of the Addon WAF

<a id="nestedatt--origin"></a>
### Nested Schema for `origin`

Read-Only:

- `host_header` (String) The origin host header.
- `hostname` (String) The origin host name.
